title: Today
excerpt: We're busy setting up the Sketchbook booth for the CHA tradeshow today. Please do stop by American Crafts and say hi! If you're not going to be at the show, don't fret - we will do our best to keep…
body:
We're busy setting up the Sketchbook booth for the CHA tradeshow today. Please do stop by American Crafts and say hi! If you're not going to be at the show, don't fret - we will do our best to keep you updated via Twitter and Facebook, and if we can steal some time, right here on the blog. Scrapbook Update will be keeping you posted as well, grateful they chose Sketchbook as one of their picks. If you missed our booth last year for the launch of my first signature line, here is how it came together.

NOTE: Creativation (formerly CHA)
